subject: FACT: We must do more for Alzheimer's
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd3f4/2a380d31/13fc9f6b/f8a5c9/1562711478/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd3f4/2a380d31/13fc9f6b/f8a5c9/1562711478/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd3f4/2a380d31/13fc9f6b/f8a5ca/1562711478/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://www.signforgood.com/fundalzheimersresearch/?code=Hassan&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")**Fact:** In the time it takes you to read this email, someone in America could have developed Alzheimer's.
Alzheimer's is the sixth leading cause of death in the United States, 5.4 million Americans live with the disease, and care for those affected destabilizes the economic health of families. This disease is stealing our loved ones and our economic security. We have to do more.
[**Put your name down to tell Congress: Our families can't wait -- appropriately fund research to find a treatment for Alzheimer's.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd3f4/2a380d31/13fc9f6b/f8a5ca/1562711478/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://www.signforgood.com/fundalzheimersresearch/?code=Hassan&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Here at home, Maggie has signed legislation requiring the state to develop an educational program on Alzheimer's and provide training to our law enforcement officers on the disease. Now, we need a national response from Congress to better understand and deal with this massively devastating, yet little understood menace.
[**Join Maggie and other leaders and call on Congress to put a renewed focus on finding a cure for Alzheimer's. Sign the petition now.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd3f4/2a380d31/13fc9f6b/f8a5ca/1562711478/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://www.signforgood.com/fundalzheimersresearch/?code=Hassan&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
If we're going to find a cure for this terrible disease, it's going to take all of us, and that's a fact.
-- Team Maggie

Contact: Brittney Wilson
802-274-2722
_**Phil Scott's 'Green Flag' Tour Races into Washington County**_ Montpelier, VT - Phil Scott's statewide Green Flag tour races into Washington County.

Scott is touring all across Vermont to discuss his plan to strengthen the economy, make Vermont more affordable and make sure the state budget does not grow faster than Vermont’s economy or Vermonters’ income. The tour also features 'Blizzard' a small passenger bus, frequently piloted by the candidate, that has been converted into a mobile campaign office.

Later this week, Scott’s tour continues as he heads into Bennington and Rutland counties. For more information, contact [Brittney@PhilScott.org](mailto:brittney@philscott.org).

body:

| Look,

**There are a lot of reasons the poll that came out last week was scary.**

For me, the most disturbing is that if we don't change things fast, women's health care in Florida and around the country could disappear for good.

If Patrick doesn't win this race and protect Planned Parenthood, we could have a Marco Rubio clone representing Florida in Washington. And worse yet -- __we could have another Republican Senate.__

**We all know what that means: goodbye Planned Parenthood funding, hello extreme views on women's health.**

This election isn't just about Democrats vs. Republicans. **It 's about whether or not women across the country have control over their own lives.** It doesn't get more dire than that.

[_**That 's why you need to step up right now. If we don't get our message out there, Republicans could walk away with this race -- and women's rights. Will you give $5 right now?**_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae238f/738133e4/350f9525/7f8244f6/2379839813/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160517b?refcode=pme160517b_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Marco Rubio wants to ban abortions after 20 weeks and has voted numerous times to defund Planned Parenthood in the Senate. He's done everything he can to make it nearly impossible for Florida women to do things like get basic health care and cancer screenings.

This country, women especially, can't afford another Marco Rubio. [_**Will you step up right now and make a contribution?**_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae238f/738133e4/350f9525/7f8244f6/2379839813/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160517b?refcode=pme160517b_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Thank you for standing with Patrick and Planned Parenthood!

Laura |

This is one of the toughest parts of our campaign so far, and I want to be crystal clear about that. We're staying focused on closing out this primary while also fighting on a second front -- and Donald Trump and his supporters have already turned their attention toward beating us.

**[Can I count on you to help me fight both campaigns at the same time? When you make your first donation today, we’ll send you a free sticker as a thank you.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU1MTg4MTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyNzA5NjAyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Now more than ever, we need to remind ourselves exactly what this campaign is about -- that we have a tremendous responsibility to fight for people who aren't getting ahead. The single mothers without access to decent childcare, the families torn apart by gun violence, and the children of immigrants living in fear of deportation.

We can’t get complacent or discouraged -- there are just too many people counting on us. **Will you let me know you’re still with me? I know that if we work together we can close out this primary and turn our focus toward the real threat, Donald Trump:**

name: Sheila O'Connell, Chris Van Hollen for US Senate
subject: they punted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|

>
> Friend,
>
> Monday, the Supreme Court did something unprecedented.
>
> Instead of offering an opinion on a case that would determine whether or not employers could involve themselves in the private health care decisions of their employees, the Supreme Court punted.
>
> In an unsigned opinion the Supreme Court announced that it would not rule in a major case and instructed lower courts to act instead.
>
> **[This is far from the last major decision that the court will face in 2016 and that's why it's essential that Senate Republicans stop stalling and consider the president's nominee for Supreme Court. Add your name and say you're standing with Chris on this important issue.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d13/70cdc2ba/47e0bb53/396d9f4/2946451421/VEsH/ "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/tell-senate-republicans-to-do-their-jobs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+This+is+far+from+the+last+major+decision&utm_campaign=em051816&source=em051816")**
>
> Despite Republican talking points, this appointment is far from controversial. In American history at least 17 justices have been confirmed in a presidential election year. In fact, since the Civil War, no Supreme Court vacancy has been left open for a full year - but that's what many obstructionists in the Republican party are calling for.
>
> You and I know that we can't let our justice system falter for even a moment when major cases that affect reproductive freedom, access to health care, voting rights, and so many of the issues we care about are on the line.
>
> **Add your name:** **[Stand with Chris and tell Republicans to stop their obstructionist agenda and consider the President's nominee for Supreme Court. >>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d13/70cdc2ba/47e0bb53/396d9f5/2946451421/VEsE/ "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/tell-senate-republicans-to-do-their-jobs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Stand+with+Chris+and+tell+Republicans+to&utm_campaign=em051816&source=em051816")**
> Sheila O'Connell
> Campaign Manager

> ---
>
>

These are Trump's picks | Friend --

Donald Trump just released a list of 11 people he'd vet to fill the vacant seat on the Supreme Court if he wins the White House.

The list includes extreme ideologues who, if given the chance, would likely roll back our progress in critical fights like marriage equality and health care -- and would do devastating damage to a woman's right to choose, a union's right to organize, and everyone's right to vote.

And this being Donald Trump, it should come as no surprise that not one of his choices is a person of color.

If we let Trump win, he might be in the White House long enough to appoint as many as three Supreme Court justices who'd destroy our rights for generations.
